name: arkadaz
description: tiger-skills: harness-engineering (outer loop conductor) orchestrates superpowers skills with state tracking + code-quality (inner loop) enforces design principles on every line

plugins.name: tiger-skills
plugins.description: Two skills that work as one system. harness-engineering (outer loop): 8-phase conductor that orchestrates superpowers skills (brainstorming, writing-plans, TDD, subagent-driven-development, systematic-debugging, verification-before-completion) with bootstrap gate, session discipline, auto-track 8 harness files, 3-layer verification pipeline, and 7-point completion gate layered on top. code-quality (inner loop): 13 design principles + 11 tooling rules with comprehension gate, DI enforcement, 5-case type fix, independent review agent.
